fields.label: Overview
fields.name: overview
fields.default_value: A succinct intro (2–3 sentences) framing the article’s main argument/angle.

fields.label: Context
fields.name: context
fields.default_value:
Frame it in time, audience, or industry relevance. 1–2 sentences max.
E.g., “As SaaS pricing shifts toward outcome-based models, this analysis explores…”

fields.label: Application
fields.name: application
fields.default_value:
Who should read this and what they’ll gain. Again, short and punchy.
E.g., “CMOs, revenue leads, and ops teams will benefit from this pricing strategy analysis.”

fields.label: Ad Slot Selector
fields.name: ad_slot_selector
fields.instructions: Select the Ad Slot you wish to use. Display options are Sidebar 1, Sidebar 2 or Header. Dynamic options are Pop Up, Exit Intent, Slide In and Ticker

fields.label: Campaign Type
fields.name: campaign_type
fields.instructions: Select whether the campaign is led by content dynamically, set placement for a period of time or a mix of both

fields.label: Featured Posts Override
fields.name: featured_posts_override
fields.instructions: Override the automatic logic by manually choosing 1–6 featured articles

fields.label: On/Off toggle
fields.name: onoff_toggle
fields.instructions: Turn off to disable the Suggested Reading block on this post.

fields.label: Override Tag for Suggestions
fields.name: override_by_tag
fields.instructions: Select a tag to filter all suggested posts. Suggested block will only show posts with this tag.

labels.name: Ad Slots
labels.choose_from_most_used: Choose from the most used ad slots
labels.item_link_description: A link to a ad slot
